prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small yellow rubber cube
  - obj_1: small blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_2: small brown metal sphere
  - obj_3: large gray rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_5: small brown metal cube
  - obj_6: large blue metal cube
  - obj_7: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: large purple metal sphere
  - obj_9: small brown metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0061] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0062] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0063] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0064] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0065] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0066] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0067] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0068] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0069] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0070] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0071] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0072] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0073] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0074] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0075] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0076] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0077] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0078] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0079] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0080] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scenes carefully. There are 4 different scene images shown, and I need to identify which scene corresponds to which object labeling.

Looking at the questions, they all reference the same objects (obj_0 through obj_9), so I need to work with one consistent scene.

Let me analyze the scenes and identify object positions. The questions ask about distances between pairs of objects.

Let me focus on estimating 3D positions from the images:

- obj_0: small yellow rubber cube - center area
- obj_1: small blue rubber cylinder - behind/left area
- obj_2: small brown metal sphere - right area
- obj_3: large gray rubber cylinder - center
- obj_4: small cyan metal cube - behind area
- obj_5: small brown metal cube - left/front area
- obj_6: large blue metal cube - left area
- obj_7: large cyan rubber cylinder - center-right area
- obj_8: large purple metal sphere - front area
- obj_9: small brown metal cylinder - right area

Now I need to estimate the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 (yellow cube to gray cylinder) and compare it to various other pairs.

The yellow cube and gray cylinder appear to be relatively close together in the scenes.

Let me estimate distances systematically:
- obj_0 to obj_3: yellow cube to gray cylinder ≈ moderate distance (~2-3 units)
- obj_2 to obj_4: brown sphere to cyan cube ≈ large distance
- obj_2 to obj_5: brown sphere to brown cube ≈ moderate-large
- obj_2 to obj_6: brown sphere to blue cube ≈ large
- obj_2 to obj_7: brown sphere to cyan cylinder ≈ moderate
- obj_2 to obj_8: brown sphere to purple sphere ≈ moderate
- obj_2 to obj_9: brown sphere to brown cylinder ≈ small
- obj_4 to obj_5: cyan cube to brown cube ≈ large
- obj_4 to obj_6: cyan cube to blue cube ≈ large
- obj_4 to obj_7: cyan cube to cyan cylinder ≈ moderate
- obj_4 to obj_8: cyan cube to purple sphere ≈ large
- obj_4 to obj_9: cyan cube to brown cylinder ≈ moderate
- obj_5 to obj_6: brown cube to blue cube ≈ moderate
- obj_5 to obj_7: brown cube to cyan cylinder ≈ moderate
- obj_5 to obj_8: brown cube to purple sphere ≈ moderate
- obj_5 to obj_9: brown cube to brown cylinder ≈ moderate
- obj_6 to obj_7: blue cube to cyan cylinder ≈ moderate
- obj_6 to obj_8: blue cube to purple sphere ≈ moderate-large
- obj_6 to obj_9: blue cube to brown cylinder ≈ moderate
- obj_7 to obj_8: cyan cylinder to purple sphere ≈ moderate
- obj_7 to obj_9: cyan cylinder to brown cylinder ≈ small-moderate
